<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Configure Release Git<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Configure Git identity and optionally refresh tags for release automation.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                                     | Required | Default                                        |
|---------------------|-------------------------------------------------|----------|------------------------------------------------|
| `user-name`         | Git user.name for release commits.              | `false`  | `github-actions[bot]`                          |
| `user-email`        | Git user.email for release commits.             | `false`  | `github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com` |
| `fetch-tags`        | Fetch tags from the remote before release work. | `false`  | `true`                                         |
| `working-directory` | Directory containing the Git checkout.          | `false`  | `.`                                            |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/configure-release-git" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Configure Git for release automation"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/configure-release-git@main"
```

<!--/usage-->
